raw12_pre_registration_note: 본 spec는 raw#12 frozen — post-hoc 변경 금지. AN11(c) re-measurement 결과가 PASS 여부와 무관하게 본 thresholds/protocol 고정.

roadmap.title: [CP1 real-use serving deploy] Mk.VI VERIFIED endpoint + AN11(c) PASS + r13 corpus tokenization

model.label: anima-cp1-mk-vi-verified-r6-p1
model.alternative_round_caveat: r9 trained 사용 시 Mk.VI VERIFIED 보장 X (raw#10 honest); r6 p1 + r6 p4 LoRA가 Mk.VI 정의의 evidence anchor.

native_paths.purpose: prompt → persona response (trained p1 LoRA applied)
live Φ report (per-request hidden-state spectrum vs r14 eval set)

rate_limit.enforcement: token-bucket per IP; deny 429 over budget

auth.production: bearer token via env CP1_API_KEY (deferred to roadmap #88 public API)

tls.production: Caddy auto-LE on anima.ai subdomain (deferred to #88)

serving_infra_options.name: vllm
serving_infra_options.best_for: H100 SXM, 8B base + r=64 LoRA, AGI demo throughput

serving_infra_options.name: tgi
serving_infra_options.best_for: HF ecosystem, multi-LoRA hot-swap, dest1/dest2 dual persona later

serving_infra_options.name: llama.cpp
serving_infra_options.best_for: Mac M4 Metal Q5_K_M, $0/mo persistent local, after merge_and_unload + GGUF convert + quantize

serving_infra_options.name: fastapi
serving_infra_options.best_for: /phi + /hexad custom routes, peft direct load, no vllm dependency

local_cpu_mac_m4.caveat: M4 16GB requires Q5_K_M quantize after LoRA merge; gguf conversion stage owned by tool/cp1_serve_launch_mac.bash

runpod_cpu_pod.caveat: no LoRA-native infra at CPU tier; persistent endpoint cheap

h100_sxm_runpod.caveat: AGI demo grade; for short windows use auto_kill scope; full month cost prohibitive without revenue

an11_c_remeasurement_protocol.purpose: post-deploy live JSD measurement of CP1 endpoint vs r6 baseline; closes AN11(c) FAIL_INFRA gap (state/alm_latest_an11_verify.json)
an11_c_remeasurement_protocol.aggregator: mean JSD per prompt across 20 generations; verdict = 16/16 PASS criterion

method.type: next-token distribution JSD per prompt (logprob histograms)

an11_c_remeasurement_protocol.expected_blocker: current baseline 0.110 << 0.5; trained r6 p1 endpoint 측정값 unknown until live-decode

r13_corpus_tokenization_protocol.purpose: anima에 r13 alm corpus 부재. CP1 deploy의 selectability gate가 아니지만 #110 exit_criteria에 포함 → endpoint launch 이전 acquire 권장.

acquisition_sources_ranked.name: external_kos_fineweb_fork
acquisition_sources_ranked.rationale: HF dataset (CC-licensed Korean web), known-good tokenization corpus

acquisition_sources_ranked.name: user_curated_proposal_inventory
acquisition_sources_ranked.rationale: state/proposals/inventory.json + refinement v2/v3 ledger; small but high-signal

acquisition_sources_ranked.name: synthetic_distillation_from_r6
acquisition_sources_ranked.rationale: chicken-and-egg (uses CP1 to bootstrap r13); deferred until CP1 live

five_phase_runbook_summary.name: model_lora_load
five_phase_runbook_summary.exit_artifact: in-memory model OR state/cp1_merged_model/ on disk

five_phase_runbook_summary.name: an11_c_remeasure
decision_axes: baseline endpoint reuse vs cold call

raw10_honest_blockers: actual deploy NOT executed (separate cycle owns)
r13 alm corpus absent locally — acquisition required
Mk.VI LoRA r6 p1 local present (state/trained_adapters_r6/p1/final/) but r6 p4 verified path also valid
AN11(c) PASS NOT guaranteed: current baseline 0.110 << threshold 0.5 — hidden-state JSD proxy used in baseline; live next-token JSD may lift but not guaranteed

premium_h100_persistent_24h.note: AGI demo window + uptime SLA observation

exit_criteria_for_roadmap_110_done: state/alm_latest_serve_endpoint.json written with live URL — Phase 5

tool_chain.h100_actuator_pending: tool/cp1_serve_launch.bash (ref doc only, not yet authored)
